engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Template matching logic: given a message, return ranked template suggestions
Draft flow with template selection: template populates textarea, templateUsed is recorded on save
Template type definitions, template picker props
Graceful fallback when no template matches (show empty state, not an error)
No DB schema change needed for static JSON approach
Template lookup is O(n) keyword scan — with <20 templates this is instant
Internal staff tool, templates are hardcoded text, no user input injection risk
Template picker UI needs keyboard navigation and screen reader labels
EN + IT template text; language selection mechanism
Optional: track template usage rates via existing telemetry

stage_payload.scope_summary: ### In Scope - Template data file: extract answerComposer answers into a shared static JSON/TS module with EN + IT text, categories, keywords, and links - Template picker component: new UI component in DraftReviewPanel that shows matching/browsable templates for Prime threads only - Template selection: clicking a template populates the draft textarea and sets `templateUsed` identifier - Draft save integration: extend save payload to pass `templateUsed` through to the draft record - Unit tests for template matching logic - Integration tests for draft flow with template selection ### Out of Scop

analysis_readiness.Architecture fully mapped: Prime Q&A engine, reception draft flow, channel adapters, existing template plumbing

rehearsal_issues.Coverage Confirmed: Yes — answerComposer.ts has 6 categories with structured answers + links
rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: Answers are EN-only in code; IT versions needed

rehearsal_issues.Coverage Confirmed: Yes — DraftReviewPanel has clear insertion point and existing templateUsed badge
rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: Template picker component does not exist yet

rehearsal_issues.Coverage Confirmed: Yes — PUT draft route accepts plainText and templateUsed is tracked on the draft model
rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: templateUsed is not currently passed from client to server on save
rehearsal_issues.Resolution Required: Extend save payload to include templateUsed

rehearsal_issues.Coverage Confirmed: Yes — Prime direct adapter has supportsDraftSave: true
rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: No changes needed to adapter capabilities

rehearsal_issues.Coverage Confirmed: Partially — sent drafts with null templateUsed are observable
rehearsal_issues.Resolution Required: Phase 2 or simple logging in v1

rehearsal_issues.Coverage Confirmed: Yes — Homepage.json has EN + IT preset questions
rehearsal_issues.Resolution Required: Create IT translations for template answers
